easytalk-present.title: EasyTalk: Therapy Web App
bulletPoints: Design the app's entity-relationship model and implemented it in Django.
Developed the features of search/filtering of professionals and appointment scheduling.
Wrote unit tests that found edge cases and bugs which had not been discovered before.
Prototyped the UI in Figma and built it using Bootstrap.
Received a 10/10 grade after presenting EasyTalk as the final project for the Systems Analysis and Development degree.

fatec.title: Systems Analysis and Development
bulletPoints: I elaborated the entity-relationship model of the system and implemented it in Django.
I implemented the functions for searching professionals and scheduling consultations.
I wrote unit tests that found edge cases and bugs that had not been considered before.
I prototyped the interface in Figma and built it using Bootstrap.
I received a perfect grade after presenting the work to the evaluation committee.

habitat.title: IT Intern
bulletPoints: Rebuilt, in 3 months and using Django, the company's corporate website that was previously made in WordPress.
Set up an administrator panel that interacts with the MySQL database to allow the website's mantainer to update its contents with ease.
Remade and modernized the website's design, making prototypes in Figma and implementing them with Bootstrap.
